description_long: This bed features a robust, dark wooden frame with a simple, geometric design. The headboard and footboard are both present, each constructed from thick, rectangular beams, with the headboard incorporating a diagonal support bar for added stability and visual interest. The side rails are similarly solid, with open slats that give the bed a slightly modern, industrial look. The sleeping surface appears to be a bare mattress or a tightly fitted sheet, with a subtle, textured pattern visible across its surface. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for outdoor or semi-public urban environments such as parks or communal spaces. The color palette is predominantly black, contributing to a sleek and understated aesthetic.
description: A sturdy, black wooden bed with a geometric frame, visible headboard and footboard, and a bare, textured mattress surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open slatted side rails and the full length of the bed frame.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the footboard with its diagonal support bar and the width of the bed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the slatted rail design and showing the headboard structure.
description_view_3: Head-on view of the headboard with its diagonal support and the full mattress surface.
